title: meriania leucantha
intro: Meriania leucantha, also known as the white Meriania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Meriania leucantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
